subcodes.first_line: O herald of the Covenant! Your letter dated the eighth of Rabi'u'l-Avval 1325 hath been received, and from its contents it hath become evident [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منادی پیمان نامه هشتم ربیع اول سنه ۱۳۲۵ واصل گردید از مضمون نامه معلوم شد
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
